item.title: stuartpykesport: Stuart Pyke @stuartpykesport · 31s Important information for Rugby League fans…. The #SuperLeague matches between Wakefi
item.description: Stuart Pyke @stuartpykesport · 31s Important information for Rugby League fans…. The #SuperLeague matches between Wakefield + Bradford, then Catalans v Warrington will now both be broadcast ‘live’ on Sky Sports Action (ch 412 on Sky Q)

item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 6min SPRINGER DUMPS OUT ANDERSON!
The defending champion is OUT in Sindelfingen
Niko Spring
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 6min SPRINGER DUMPS OUT ANDERSON!
The defending champion is OUT in Sindelfingen
Niko Springer sees off Gary Anderson 6-3 in a frenzied match that saw eight breaks of throw from nine legs
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 2 26 3 mil

item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 6min 𝗦𝗣𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗚𝗘𝗥 𝗗𝗘𝗧𝗛𝗥𝗢𝗡𝗘𝗦 𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗙𝗟𝗬𝗜𝗡𝗚 𝗦𝗖𝗢𝗧𝗦𝗠𝗔𝗡
Gary Anderson's reign as back-to-back European Dar
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 6min 𝗦𝗣𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗚𝗘𝗥 𝗗𝗘𝗧𝗛𝗥𝗢𝗡𝗘𝗦 𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗙𝗟𝗬𝗜𝗡𝗚 𝗦𝗖𝗢𝗧𝗦𝗠𝗔𝗡
Gary Anderson's reign as back-to-back European Darts Grand Prix champion comes to an end as he suffers a 6-3 defeat to home favourite Niko Springer with a 90.5 average and 3/10 on the doubles 1 4 348

item.title:
Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 6min Niko Springer ends the reign of Gary Anderson in Sindelfingen!
The Flying Scotsman has lifted t
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 6min Niko Springer ends the reign of Gary Anderson in Sindelfingen!
The Flying Scotsman has lifted the trophy the past two years here but a strong surge from the German early in the match left Anderson with too much to do.
Springer beat Michael van Gerwen last week, Anderson this Mostrar más 1 48
